description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the eclipse/ubuntu_jdk8 Docker image and defines two stages: build and deploy, with Maven options set via MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables. In the build stage add a validate job that runs `cd src/com.osthus.shapes.shaclc.parent` then `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS clean install`, and always publishes the compiled target directories as a validate artifact named "validate" that expires after 120 minutes. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs manually only on the master branch, executes `cd src/com.osthus.shapes.shaclc.parent` followed by `mvn -X $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy`, and stores the same target directories as a deploy artifact named "deploy" that expires after 14 days. No caches or services are used.
